features: CONTAINS NATURAL TEA TREE: Trusted Escenti formula with tea tree oil. A natural lice repellent, detangles, repels and conditions giving your little ones clean, fresh hair that will help keep head lice at bay.

GENTLE PREVENTION: Escenti 3 in 1 Head Lice Defence Hair Care range contains Tea Tree oil a pure essential oil, natural antiseptic effective against head lice. A head lice defence product needs to be used very regularly. Escenti formulations are suitable for frequent, if preferred daily use.

HOW TO USE: Escenti 3 in 1 Head Lice Defence Hair Care range can be used just before school term starts, daily during term time, during or between washes of regular shampoo and conditioners to fit around group children's events and parties

STOP ITCHING ! REMOVE & REPEL LICE: Head lice are a common problem especially in children's hair, during school term and group play. Head lice can spread rapidly and be tough to get rid of. Escenti formulation is suitable for regular, effective use whilst remaining kind to hair
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: 300ML, 3 in 1 TEA TREE HEAD LICE DEFENCE CONDITIONER
description: Product Description ESCENTI 3 in 1 TEA TREE HEAD LICE DEFENCE CONDITIONER, CLEANS, REPELS, CONDITIONS Directions Apply after shampooing, leave in hair, rinse out. Can be used daily.
